codeReview.summary: The order-to-cash review doc satisfies VAL-O2C-001 and VAL-O2C-002. It narrates dealer onboarding, dealer portal, credit requests, override approvals, sales-order lifecycle, dispatch confirmation, invoice generation, settlement, aging/ledger, and accounting linkages with concrete code, schema, test, and OpenAPI evidence.

summary: PASS. The order-to-cash review artifact is thorough, internally consistent with the cited code/tests, and covers the required state-machine, idempotency, accounting-coupling, and ERP-integrity angles without scrutiny-level defects.
